seo.author: DS3 Build Guide
seo.title: DS3 Bleed / Luck Build — Full Guide | Dark Souls 3
seo.description: Complete Dark Souls 3 bleed build guide. Optimal stats, weapons, rings and armor for a Bleed/Luck build at SL 120. Community-tested.
seo.keywords: dark souls 3 bleed build, ds3 luck build, warden twinblades build, dark souls 3 guide, ds3 sl120 build

info.title: Bleed / Luck
info.description: A community-optimized build for those who seek speed, aggression, and the art of bleeding their enemies dry. Based on real stats and years of collective testing.
info.quote: "The flame fades, and darkness takes the place of fire. Yet you persist — blood-stained, unending."

weapons.name: Warden Twinblades
weapons.subtitle: Guardian Twin Blades
weapons.description: The best bleed weapons in the entire game. With Carthus Rouge, you proc bleed in just 2–3 L1 hits. The weapon art Spin Slash destroys virtually any boss.
weapons.location: Undead Settlement — Farmed from Cathedral Grave Wardens near the Cathedral of the Deep. ~5% drop. Use Symbol of Avarice + Gold Serpent Ring.

weapons.name: Onikiri & Ubadachi
weapons.subtitle: Hunter's Twin Katanas
weapons.description: If you love katanas, these are your endgame. More reach than the Wardens with an incredible moveset. Hollow infusion at 40/40/50 STR/DEX/LCK gives unique AR.
weapons.location: Grand Archives — Defeat NPC Black Hand Kamui on the top floor before the final boss. Unmissable fight.

weapons.name: Uchigatana
weapons.subtitle: Your companion until endgame
weapons.description: Perfect for the first half of the game. Infuse Sharp and scale DEX to 40. Boost bleed with Carthus Rouge when available.
weapons.location: Firelink Shrine — From the Sword Master at the entrance. Or start as Mercenary / Assassin.

weapons.name: Hollow Caestus +10
weapons.subtitle: +5 free Luck in offhand
weapons.description: Having 2 Hollow +10 weapons equipped gives you +10 free Luck. The Caestus weighs almost nothing and enables emergency parries.
weapons.location: Firelink Shrine — Buy from the Shrine Handmaid for 200 souls. Infuse Hollow once you unlock the Profaned Coal.

rings.name: Prisoner's Chain
rings.effect: +5 Vigor, +5 Endurance, +5 Vitality. The best ring for physical builds — saves 15 stat levels.
rings.location: DLC Ashes of Ariandel — Kill boss Gravetender Greatwolf. Without DLC: Ring of Favor +3.

rings.name: Carthus Bloodring
rings.effect: +10 iframes on dodge. Your roll keeps maximum frames regardless of equip load.
rings.location: Catacombs of Carthus — Behind the door opened by the fire skeleton ball. Chest item.

rings.name: Ring of Favor +3
rings.effect: +6% HP, +11.5% Stamina, +8.5% equip load. Excellent all-around value for any build.
rings.location: Base version: Irithyll Dungeon (Angels). +3 version: Ringed City DLC.

rings.name: Lloyd's Sword Ring
rings.effect: +10% damage at full HP. Boosts the opening burst before taking damage.
rings.location: Irithyll of the Boreal Valley — Anor Londo area, silver knight chambers.

armor.name: Dancer's Crown
armor.description: Excellent physical defense for its low weight. Obtained after killing the Dancer of the Boreal Valley.
armor.alternative: Old Wolf Curved Sword Hood / Nameless King Helm

armor.name: Alva Armor
armor.description: Best weight-to-defense ratio in the game. Farmable from an NPC invader in Irithyll of the Boreal Valley.

armor.name: Dancer's Gauntlets
armor.description: Completes the Dancer set. For a lighter option use Wanderer Manchettes (near weightless).

armor.name: Alva Leggings
armor.description: Complete the Alva set. Light, solid physical defense and balanced resistances.
